The class diagrams in this directory do not aim at completeness, but rather at providing a clear
understanding of the structure.
The png files have been generated with bouml v 3.3.4
The bouml project files (and diagrams) are saved in the "bouml" directory.
Attempts to save the project in an xmi file have failed because the diagrams are not included in the xmi output.
Bouml is the most efficient tool that I could find for reverse-engineering of class diagrams.
No actual portability to other tools, afaik. Umbrello is a good alternative, but not so fast as bouml.
